name: Fife of the Faithful
description:
This small metal fife is of extraordinary fine quality, with gold filigree on the embouchure. A fife of the faithful grants you a +1 item bonus to Performance checks while playing music with the instrument.

Activate—Call to Arms 2 (auditory, concentrate, manipulate)

Frequency once per day

Effect You play a rousing tune on the fife that carries across the battlefield. You and all allies in a gain a +1 status bonus to saving throws for 1 round.
